expectations.text: Skill reads backlog.md rather than re-analysing the repo from scratch
expectations.evidence: decision_path mentions backlog/Case A; backlog.md size=415

expectations.text: Top three tasks are surfaced and ranked by the weighted heuristic
expectations.evidence: top_three has 3 items with score fields

expectations.text: AUTH-001 is ranked #1 (it has p1 + blocks others)
expectations.evidence: top_three[0] = {'id': 'AUTH-001', 'title': 'Add password reset flow', 'score': 55, 'reason': '+40 blocks AUTH-002, +15 priority p1'}

expectations.text: SEC-001 is in the top three (security +35 weight)
The skill records or references AskUserQuestion as the prompting mechanism (not prose)
expectations.evidence: AskUserQuestion referenced in questions-asked.md or transcript: True

expectations.text: No agent is spawned before the user picks from the top three
expectations.evidence: agent_spawned field records what WOULD have been spawned, not actually spawned

expectations.text: Skill detects pm_framework: project-manager (docs/features/ + docs/plans/ both present)
Skill does NOT create a backlog.md file
Skill recommends delegating to /continue-tasks or /review-tasks
docs/what-next.md is written with pm_framework: project-manager
Top tasks surfaced come from docs/plans/*.md (not invented or from analysis)
Skill detects pm_framework: none (no task store, no project-manager convention)
User is offered four bootstrap options: /project-manager, create backlog.md, code analysis, manual input
expectations.evidence: options offered: ['Run /project-manager setup', 'Create a backlog.md (Recommended)', 'Run a repo-wide code analysis', "I'll tell you the tasks myself"]

expectations.text: Inferred area map includes AUTH, UI, API prefixes
Area map is presented to the user for confirmation before first backlog item
No backlog.md is written until the user's choice has been recorded
expectations.evidence: chose=Create a backlog.md (Recommended), backlog.md exists: True

expectations.text: Skill recomputes fingerprints for all tracked files regardless of cached values
Stale task LEGACY-001 (references deleted file) is marked stale, NOT auto-closed
A short diff summary is printed (areas/tasks added or archived)
expectations.evidence: diff_summary: 'Areas changed: none; Tasks added: 0; Archived: 0; Marked stale: 1 (LEGACY-001); Fingerprints refreshed: 2/2.'

expectations.text: docs/what-next.md is rewritten with fresh fingerprints and updated date
After refresh, the skill proceeds to present top-three via AskUserQuestion
